articles.title: American soldier and British soldier die in training accident in Iraq - CBS News
articles.description: The U.S. and British militaries say one American soldier and one British soldier died during a training exercise in Iraq.
articles.content: An American soldier and a British soldier died in a training accident and Iraq, officials in the United States and United Kingdom said Monday. They did not release more details about the incident, wh… [+1587 chars]
